INSERT INTO `users` (`openId`, `name`, `email`, `role`, `timezone`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`, `lastSignedIn`)
VALUES ('operator-live-test-001', 'Test Operator', 'operator@chorus.ai', 'operator', 'Africa/Johannesburg', NOW(), NOW(), NOW());

-- Insert test event
INSERT INTO `events` (`eventId`, `title`, `company`, `platform`, `status`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`)
VALUES ('test-event-live-001', 'Q4 2025 Earnings Call - Live Test', 'Chorus Call Inc.', 'zoom', 'upcoming', NOW(), NOW());

-- Insert test session
INSERT INTO `operator_sessions` (`sessionId`, `eventId`, `operatorId`, `status`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`)
VALUES ('test-session-live-001', 'test-event-live-001', 1, 'idle', NOW(), NOW());

-- Insert test questions
INSERT INTO `questions` (`sessionId`, `questionText`, `submitterName`, `status`, `complianceRiskScore`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt`)
VALUES 
  ('test-session-live-001', 'What is your guidance for Q1 2026?', 'John Investor', 'submitted', 0.3, NOW(), NOW()),

  ('test-session-live-001', 'What are the margin expectations going forward?', 'Bob Trader', 'submitted', 0.7, NOW(), NOW());
